name: Black Cherry Dessert Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 cups Pitted Bing cherries, fresh or canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until light.
2. Gradually add sugar; beat until lemon-colored.
3. Add sifted dry ingredients.
4. Add water, vanilla, and almond extract; mix well.
5. Pour into two prepared round layer pans.
6. Drop cherries over batter (save some for garnish).
7. Sprinkle with nuts.
8. Bake in a moderate oven, 350°F, for 30 minutes.
9. Serve slightly warm with sweetened whipped cream between layers and over the top.
10. Garnish with whole cherries.
